calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Ching Yee Hung Wong mother of minor.
Petitioner Ching Yee Hung Wong sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Consent from father on file.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Cheuk Nam Hung to Jason Hung.
Court grants petition to change name of mother from Ching Yee Hung Wong to Jess Wong.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
